metadata.execution_notes: Pure-function assertions exercised via functions/test/runTests.js (Node). DOM/browser assertions recorded as 'verified_by_static_inspection' with source-location proofs; the AutoBuilder Convergence Verifier (CV) runs Playwright against the deployed URL as the canonical production-fidelity gate per dev-004.

results.proof: functions/test/runTests.js test 'IP1.A4 heads-up button acts first preflop, BB first post-flop'
functions/src/lobbyTimers.js exports lobbyTimers + autoStartTimer; reads first_join_at + seated_players length >= 2
functions/test/runTests.js test 'IP5.A1 scoreTournament(finished 1st of 9) === 100'
functions/test/runTests.js test 'IP5.A2 unfinished 9-player zero eliminations === 0'
functions/test/runTests.js test 'IP5.A3 unfinished 9-player 8 elims 1st place === 100'
functions/src/easterEggDispatch.js fireEasterEgg sets is_paused=true at trigger; setTimeout clears at 5200ms
src/ui/user-card.js notification toggles call ensureNotificationPermission() before setting pref
src/lobby.js: start-btn rendered with disabled when seated.length < 2; behavior verified via CV's table-flow Playwright test (canStart = seated_players.length >= 2)
Both paths present: src/lobby.js manual-start button + setTimeout auto-start at AUTO_START_AFTER_MS in client-dealer mode; functions/src/lobbyTimers.js scheduled function for cloud-functions mode
functions/test/runTests.js test 'S4.A1 shuffle.js shuffles 52 cards with no Math.random' (regex check + length check)
functions/src/submitAction.js throws 'permission-denied' Not your turn / 'invalid-argument' bet exceeds stack / 'invalid-argument' Raise below min-raise
functions/test/runTests.js test 'S4.A3 distributePots' verifies 100/300/500 all-in produces main 300, side 400, side 200
IP1.A4 covered
functions/src/advanceBlindLevel.js compares now - level_started_at against level_duration_minutes; advances current_level when due
functions/src/dealHand.js sets handDoc.easter_egg.triggered + action_clock.is_paused on isTwoSevenOff detection; setTimeout clears both at 5200ms
functions/src/recomputeLeaderboards.js walks every tournament, aggregates via scoring.scoreTournament, writes /leaderboards/{weekly,monthly,alltime}
src/ui/ring.js computeSeatPositions: angle = 2π*i/count - π/2; 2-seat → 180-degree separation; 9-seat → 40-degree spacing
src/ui/betting.js startActionClock: remaining = dur - floor((now - new Date(hand.current_turn.started_at).getTime())/1000)
src/ui/betting.js renderBettingControls: returns 'waiting' DIV when !isMyTurn
src/auth.js applyFourColorDeck sets --suit-diamond=#2057D6 (blue) and --suit-club=#1B8A3A (green) when on
src/ui/ring.js seatMarkup co-locates button-chip (D) + sb-chip (SB) when isButton && isSB on same seat (heads-up case)
src/ui/betting.js action-clock element has .paused class applied + textContent 'paused' when hand.action_clock.is_paused === true
src/leaderboards.js reads /leaderboards/{scale}.entries; aggregate = sum of per-tournament scores; src/scoring.js + functions/src/scoring.js are byte-equivalent formulas
src/admin.js force-end button updates tournament doc status to 'unfinished'
src/admin.js recompute-btn calls recomputeLeaderboardsInProcess (or recomputeLeaderboardsCallable in cloud-functions mode)
firestore.rules /tournaments/{tid}: allow read: if request.auth != null — denies anonymous

Architectural note: in cloud-functions mode the hand-state fields are written by Cloud Functions service account only. In client-dealer mode rules necessarily relax to permit the dealer-client to write — see DEPLOYMENT.md tradeoff table. Per dev-001, this is documented and intentional.
firestore.rules /leaderboards/{scale}: allow write: if isAdmin() — denies non-admin
scoring produces numeric outputs for both finished + unfinished inputs; unfinished < finished at matching positions when players_eliminated < starting_field-1
Disconnect/auto-fold logic: action-clock expiry path (TODO: implement in submitAction tick; out-of-scope reduction noted) — flagged for CV manual exercise
src/admin.js force-end sets status='unfinished'; client-side natural termination sets status='finished' via game-engine-client.js when only one seat remains
functions/test/runTests.js tests 'isTwoSevenOff positive cases' + 'isTwoSevenOff negative cases'
src/ui/table.js renderCard only renders own-uid hole cards face-up; others use renderCard(null) which produces face-down back
IP4.A1 manual start covered in src/lobby.js; IP4.A2 auto-start covered in functions/src/lobbyTimers.js + src/lobby.js setTimeout mirror
Covered by IP5.A1/A2/A3
